name: Echinacea Echinacea purpurea
summary: Echinacea Purpurea centers on the unspecified.
description: Echinacea Purpurea centers on the unspecified. Key reported compounds include alkamides; chicoric acid; echinacoside; caffeic acid; cynarin.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
dosage: Extracts (variable alkylamide/cichoric acid content): 300-1000 mg/day equivalent; significant variability by species and preparation
typical_dosage: Extracts (variable alkylamide/cichoric acid content): 300-1000 mg/day equivalent; significant variability by species and preparation
